weekly_summary.group_overview:
- __RUMINANT:core__ [ocaml/ocaml](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml) merged six PRs this week covering **ephemeron runtime internals** ([ocaml/ocaml#14735](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14735)), a **type checker regression** fix ([ocaml/ocaml#14768](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14768)), and C compiler warning improvements ([ocaml/ocaml#14694](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14694)); [Simon Cruanes](https://github.com/c-cube) opened the **modular IO RFC implementation** ([ocaml/ocaml#14775](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14775)) and multiple Windows compatibility bugs surfaced ([ocaml/ocaml#14758](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14758), [ocaml/ocaml#14767](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14767))
- __RUMINANT:oxcaml__ [oxcaml/oxcaml](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml) had a high-activity week with 20 contributors: the **mixed-block representation overhaul** progressed across three PRs ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5774](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5774), [oxcaml/oxcaml#5795](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5795), [oxcaml/oxcaml#5831](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5831)), the **5.4 merge** advanced with labeled tuples support landing ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5692](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5692)), and new **preemptible fibers** ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5913](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5913)) and **copy propagation** ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5914](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5914)) PRs were opened
- __RUMINANT:tools__ [ocaml/dune](https://github.com/ocaml/dune) released **3.23.0** and immediately bumped to **3.24** development ([ocaml/dune#14333](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/14333)), with native patch implementation merged ([ocaml/dune#14177](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/14177)), Async_io ported to Lev ([ocaml/dune#14243](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/14243)), and multiple RPC reliability fixes from [Rudi Grinberg](https://github.com/rgrinberg)
- __RUMINANT:ecosystem__ [ocaml/opam-repository](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository) processed 30+ pull requests including **OCaml 5.5.0 beta1** ([ocaml/opam-repository#29750](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/pull/29750)), a 13-package **ATD 4.2.0** update ([ocaml/opam-repository#29802](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/pull/29802)), and a large **Windows conf-mingw-w64 infrastructure cleanup** covering ~70 packages ([ocaml/opam-repository#29795](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/pull/29795)); seven community blog posts published on [ocaml/ocaml.org](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml.org)
- __RUMINANT:multicore__ The multicore group was quiet this week; only [ocaml-multicore/picos](https://github.com/ocaml-multicore/picos) saw activity, limited to a follow-up comment on OCaml 5.5 compatibility ([ocaml-multicore/picos#387](https://github.com/ocaml-multicore/picos/issues/387))

core: -[ocaml/ocaml](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml) merged six PRs this week covering **ephemeron runtime internals** ([ocaml/ocaml#14735](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14735)), a **type checker regression** fix ([ocaml/ocaml#14768](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14768)), and C compiler warning improvements ([ocaml/ocaml#14694](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14694)); [Simon Cruanes](https://github.com/c-cube) opened the **modular IO RFC implementation** ([ocaml/ocaml#14775](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14775)) and multiple Windows compatibility bugs surfaced ([ocaml/ocaml#14758](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14758), [ocaml/ocaml#14767](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14767))
tools: -[ocaml/dune](https://github.com/ocaml/dune) released **3.23.0** and immediately bumped to **3.24** development ([ocaml/dune#14333](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/14333)), with native patch implementation merged ([ocaml/dune#14177](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/14177)), Async_io ported to Lev ([ocaml/dune#14243](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/14243)), and multiple RPC reliability fixes from [Rudi Grinberg](https://github.com/rgrinberg)
ecosystem: -[ocaml/opam-repository](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository) processed 30+ pull requests including **OCaml 5.5.0 beta1** ([ocaml/opam-repository#29750](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/pull/29750)), a 13-package **ATD 4.2.0** update ([ocaml/opam-repository#29802](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/pull/29802)), and a large **Windows conf-mingw-w64 infrastructure cleanup** covering ~70 packages ([ocaml/opam-repository#29795](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/pull/29795)); seven community blog posts published on [ocaml/ocaml.org](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml.org)
oxcaml: -[oxcaml/oxcaml](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml) had a high-activity week with 20 contributors: the **mixed-block representation overhaul** progressed across three PRs ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5774](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5774), [oxcaml/oxcaml#5795](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5795), [oxcaml/oxcaml#5831](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5831)), the **5.4 merge** advanced with labeled tuples support landing ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5692](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5692)), and new **preemptible fibers** ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5913](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5913)) and **copy propagation** ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5914](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5914)) PRs were opened
multicore: -The multicore group was quiet this week; only [ocaml-multicore/picos](https://github.com/ocaml-multicore/picos) saw activity, limited to a follow-up comment on OCaml 5.5 compatibility ([ocaml-multicore/picos#387](https://github.com/ocaml-multicore/picos/issues/387))

weekly_summary.activity_summary: 5.4 merge, Flambda2 and backend improvements, dune RPC reliability, opam disk usage and completion work, and odoc OxCaml rendering PRs under review.
weekly_summary.activity:
**Core ([ocaml/ocaml](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml))**
- __RUMINANT:core__ [Simon Cruanes](https://github.com/c-cube) opened [ocaml/ocaml#14775](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14775) proposing **extensible IO channels**, implementing the [modular IO RFC](https://github.com/ocaml/RFCs/blob/master/rfcs/modular_io.md) with a polymorphic channel type alongside existing native channels
- __RUMINANT:core__ [Gabriel Scherer](https://github.com/gasche) opened [ocaml/ocaml#14774](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14774) **ephemerons: wait on all domains before asking for another marking round**, extending the multi-PR GC correctness series now spanning seven related PRs
- __RUMINANT:core__ [Florian Angeletti](https://github.com/Octachron) opened [ocaml/ocaml#14763](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14763) **Lambda: merge nested labelled applications**, addressing a spurious intermediary closure during partial application of optional-argument functions; also opened debugger breakpoint on tfunctor ([ocaml/ocaml#14771](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14771)) and typechecker debug printer improvements ([ocaml/ocaml#14772](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14772))
- __RUMINANT:core__ Merged [ocaml/ocaml#14768](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14768) fixing a type checker regression in `nondep_type_rec_aux` ([ocaml/ocaml#14766](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14766)) by [Stefan Muenzel](https://github.com/smuenzel); merged [ocaml/ocaml#14709](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14709) by [Florian Angeletti](https://github.com/Octachron) updating ocamldoc page title format to `Module_name (Library name)`
- __RUMINANT:core__ [Zhang Rui](https://github.com/z-rui) opened [ocaml/ocaml#14764](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14764) fixing a logic error in `socket_poll_add` in `select_win32.c`; [Anarchos](https://github.com/Sylvain78) opened [ocaml/ocaml#14773](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14773) adapting the testsuite for Haiku OS
- __RUMINANT:core__ The **primitive aliases** RFC [ocaml/RFCs#44](https://github.com/ocaml/RFCs/issues/44) by [Nailen Matschke](https://github.com/nmatschke) continues with `positive-committee-recommendation`; scope of `with external x = y` constraints narrowed through discussion with [Clément Blaudeau](https://github.com/clementblaudeau)

**OxCaml ([oxcaml/oxcaml](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml))**
- __RUMINANT:oxcaml__ **5.4 merge progress**: labeled tuples support landed ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5692](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5692) by [David Allsopp](https://github.com/dra27-js)), `Iarray` module re-oxidised ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5882](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5882)), effect backtrace improvements ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5924](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5924) by [Simon Spies](https://github.com/spiessimon)), and multiple testsuite fixes ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5911](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5911), [oxcaml/oxcaml#5915](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5915), [oxcaml/oxcaml#5919](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5919), [oxcaml/oxcaml#5920](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5920), [oxcaml/oxcaml#5926](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5926))
- __RUMINANT:oxcaml__ **Newly opened: Preemptible fibers** ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5913](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5913) by [Aspen Smith](https://github.com/glittershark)), building on the initial preemption PR ([oxcaml/oxcaml#4881](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/4881)); arm64 port and 256-bit register test validation completed this week
- __RUMINANT:oxcaml__ **Newly opened: Copy propagation pass** for linscan and greedy allocators ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5914](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5914) by [Xavier Clerc](https://github.com/xclerc)), reducing moves by ~3-5%, plus a fix making `-copy-propagation` flag functional ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5930](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5930))
- __RUMINANT:oxcaml__ **Newly opened: `.cmx` export efficiency** ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5929](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5929) by [Mark Shinwell](https://github.com/mshinwell) and [Basile Clément](https://github.com/bclement-ocp)), avoiding traversal and rewrite of non-exported code
- __RUMINANT:oxcaml__ **Merged: Effects/continuations correctness** — fixed `caml_continuation_use_noexc` not being called when resuming unhandled continuations ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5906](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5906) by [Aspen Smith](https://github.com/glittershark)), and `epoll_wait` no longer fatal-errors on `EINTR` in the tick thread ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5904](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5904))
- __RUMINANT:oxcaml__ **Merged: Flambda2 correctness fixes** — fixed bug in `meet` for array element kinds ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5771](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5771) by [Mark Shinwell](https://github.com/mshinwell)), fixed `lambda_to_flambda` generating unnecessary `%is_int` switches for GADT matches ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5879](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5879) by [Basile Clément](https://github.com/bclement-ocp))
- __RUMINANT:oxcaml__ **Ongoing: Layout polymorphism** — `env_alloc_mode to Tpat_fun_layout` merged ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5662](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5662) by [Zesen Qian](https://github.com/riaqn)); layout polymorphic functions draft ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5870](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5870) by [Jack Rickard](https://github.com/Skepfyr))
- __RUMINANT:oxcaml__ **Ongoing: Metaprogramming** — first-class modules in quotes ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5884](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5884) by [Jakub Bachurski](https://github.com/jbachurski)), basic functorization support draft ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5903](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5903) by [Zesen Qian](https://github.com/riaqn))
- __RUMINANT:oxcaml__ **Public docs terminology cleanup**: removed monadic/comonadic language ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5893](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5893)), replaced "upstream compiler" with "stock OCaml" ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5894](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5894)), added `with-kind` syntax rationale ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5896](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5896)), documented mutable field modalities ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5897](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5897)) — all by [@julesjacobs](https://github.com/julesjacobs)
- __RUMINANT:oxcaml__ **opam-repository: dune 3.22.2+ox** in progress as draft PR ([oxcaml/opam-repository#39](https://github.com/oxcaml/opam-repository/issues/39) by [@art-w](https://github.com/art-w)), blocked on `odoc` CI failures

**Tools**
- __RUMINANT:tools__ [Rudi Grinberg](https://github.com/rgrinberg) landed a series of RPC reliability fixes: cancel pending requests ([ocaml/dune#14334](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/14334)), server-side cancellation ([ocaml/dune#14312](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/14312)), wait for listener shutdown ([ocaml/dune#14322](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/14322)), and fatal bind failure handling ([ocaml/dune#14330](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/14330))
- __RUMINANT:tools__ [Robin Bate Boerop](https://github.com/robinbb) merged a Windows **Ctrl+C shutdown fix** ([ocaml/dune#14316](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/14316)) and is building baseline cram tests ([ocaml/dune#14335](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/14335)) ahead of per-module `-I` flag filtering ([ocaml/dune#14186](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/14186))
- __RUMINANT:tools__ [Ali Caglayan](https://github.com/Alizter) coordinated the 3.23.0 release, fixed OxCaml CI workflows ([ocaml/dune#14299](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/14299)), updated OxCaml to 5.2.0minus-31 ([ocaml/dune#14305](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/14305)), and fixed fsevents warning on macOS ([ocaml/dune#14246](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/14246))
- __RUMINANT:tools__ [Charlène Gros](https://github.com/Lucccyo) is developing an **LRU-based memory bound** for the merlin indexer ([ocaml/merlin#2050](https://github.com/ocaml/merlin/issues/2050)), under active review from [@art-w](https://github.com/art-w)
- __RUMINANT:tools__ [@art-w](https://github.com/art-w) has two OxCaml PRs open in odoc covering **kind annotations** ([ocaml/odoc#1410](https://github.com/ocaml/odoc/issues/1410)) and **unboxed named types** ([ocaml/odoc#1407](https://github.com/ocaml/odoc/issues/1407)); [Shon Feder](https://github.com/shonfeder) filed four OxCaml tracking issues for odoc ([ocaml/odoc#1414](https://github.com/ocaml/odoc/issues/1414)–[ocaml/odoc#1417](https://github.com/ocaml/odoc/issues/1417))
- __RUMINANT:tools__ [Kate](https://github.com/kit-ty-kate) has two disk space reduction PRs open in opam: early build directory cleanup ([ocaml/opam#6906](https://github.com/ocaml/opam/issues/6906)) and selective dev-package source caching ([ocaml/opam#6440](https://github.com/ocaml/opam/issues/6440)), with live tests showing max disk+RAM usage dropping from 4–10 GB to under 2 GB
- __RUMINANT:tools__ [Brian Ward](https://github.com/WardBrian) is advancing a **four-part cmdliner completion overhaul** in opam: source compatibility ([ocaml/opam#6854](https://github.com/ocaml/opam/issues/6854)), vendored cmdliner 2.1.1 ([ocaml/opam#6867](https://github.com/ocaml/opam/issues/6867)), completion functions ([ocaml/opam#6868](https://github.com/ocaml/opam/issues/6868)), and PowerShell support ([ocaml/opam#6869](https://github.com/ocaml/opam/issues/6869))
- __RUMINANT:tools__ [@hhugo](https://github.com/hhugo) opened a new js_of_ocaml manual chapter documenting **Babel-based older browser targeting** ([ocsigen/js_of_ocaml#2216](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/issues/2216)), responding to ES6 class and `TextDecoder` breakage on iOS 16.7.5 ([ocsigen/js_of_ocaml#2215](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/issues/2215))

**Ecosystem**
- __RUMINANT:ecosystem__ **MirageOS/Robur ecosystem**: **dkim.0.11.0** (4 packages), **uspf.0.2.1**, **colombe.0.13.0** (6 packages) with msendmail and STARTTLS, **mrmime.0.7.2**, **flux.0.0.1~beta5**, and **mirage.4.10.6** all merged, primarily from [Calascibetta Romain](https://github.com/dinosaure) and [Reynir Björnsson](https://github.com/reynir)
- __RUMINANT:ecosystem__ **opentelemetry.0.91** (9 packages) merged switching from ocurl to curl dependency ([ocaml/opam-repository#29755](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/pull/29755) by [Simon Cruanes](https://github.com/c-cube))
- __RUMINANT:ecosystem__ **lwt.6.1.2** remains open pending test failures on macOS and FreeBSD at [ocaml/opam-repository#29752](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/pull/29752)
- __RUMINANT:ecosystem__ **Platform releases PR** ([ocaml/ocaml.org#3621](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml.org/issues/3621)) adding 1321 lines across 13 files remains open pending merge

weekly_summary.notable_discussions:
- __RUMINANT:core__ **Win32 opendir returns EUNKNOWNERR -267** ([ocaml/ocaml#14767](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14767)) — [Adrián Montesinos González](https://github.com/amongonz) reported that `Sys.readdir` fails on Windows with an unmapped error code; [Nicolás Ojeda Bär](https://github.com/nojb) confirmed the bug and suggested mapping `ERROR_DIRECTORY` to `ENOTDIR`
- __RUMINANT:core__ **`Unix.select` raises 'original file handle not found' on Win32** ([ocaml/ocaml#14758](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14758)) — [Zhang Rui](https://github.com/z-rui) provided detailed analysis, discovered an additional logic error in `socket_poll_add`, and opened [ocaml/ocaml#14764](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14764) with a fix
- __RUMINANT:core__ **OCaml 5.5.0~beta1 configure failure on OpenSUSE** ([ocaml/ocaml#14760](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14760)) — [Török Edwin](https://github.com/edwintorok) traced the issue to `libdir=${exec_prefix}/lib64` triggering a false conflict with `--with-relative-libdir` and opened [ocaml/ocaml#14761](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14761) with a fix
- __RUMINANT:core__ **Sys_error exception in Format.flush_standard_formatters** ([ocaml/ocaml#14765](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14765)) — [Olivier Andrieu](https://github.com/oandrieu) reported that closing stdout before program exit causes an uncaught `Sys_error` from OCaml's format library finalizers
- __RUMINANT:oxcaml__ **Preemption arm64 porting** ([oxcaml/oxcaml#4881](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/4881)): [Aspen Smith](https://github.com/glittershark) confirmed the `preemption256` test validates that 256-bit YMM registers are correctly saved across preemptions via `caml_preempt` in gdb; discussion of using `expect_asm` tests to lock down assembly output
- __RUMINANT:oxcaml__ **Kind annotation safety for existential types** ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5935](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5935)): detailed discussion between [Ryan Tjoa](https://github.com/rtjoa) and [Chris Casinghino](https://github.com/ccasin) about conditions under which existential types need checking when not explicitly named, and a subtle `non_float` error from `apply_or_null_r` separability constraints
- __RUMINANT:oxcaml__ **`.cmx` export API design** ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5929](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5929)): [Basile Clément](https://github.com/bclement-ocp) raised questions about whether the fold-based approach could cause de-duplication issues, suggesting exposing `free_imported_function_slots_and_value_slots` rather than folding all free names
- __RUMINANT:tools__ **dune 3.23.0 release coordination** ([ocaml/dune#14211](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/14211)): blockers included the Windows Ctrl+C crash ([ocaml/dune#14302](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/14302)) fixed in [ocaml/dune#14316](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/14316), and OxCaml revdep failures; nightly build failures from opam generation errors were resolved via [ocaml/dune#14270](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/14270)
- __RUMINANT:tools__ **OCAMLPATH ordering debate** ([ocaml/ocamlfind#106](https://github.com/ocaml/ocamlfind/issues/106)): [David Allsopp](https://github.com/dra27) raised that giving `site-lib` precedence over the stdlib directory could shadow compiler `META` files in typical opam switches; originates from [ocaml/opam-repository#27712](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/27712)
- __RUMINANT:tools__ **Windows NTFS case-sensitivity bug** ([ocaml/opam#6909](https://github.com/ocaml/opam/issues/6909)): upgrading `menhir` on a case-insensitive NTFS filesystem silently lowercases `menhirLib`/`menhirSdk` directories during installation, breaking subsequent dune builds; [Kate](https://github.com/kit-ty-kate) confirmed this as a novel bug
- __RUMINANT:tools__ **opam `depexts` variable interpolation gap** ([ocaml/opam#6908](https://github.com/ocaml/opam/issues/6908)): `%{var}%` strings in `depexts` package names are never interpolated, causing MSYS2 users to receive literal unresolved strings passed to `pacman`; references related issue [ocaml/opam#5836](https://github.com/ocaml/opam/issues/5836)
- __RUMINANT:tools__ **OxCaml kind-annotation formatting in odoc** ([ocaml/odoc#1410](https://github.com/ocaml/odoc/issues/1410)): [Paul-Elliot Anglès d'Auriac](https://github.com/panglesd) and [Leo White](https://github.com/lpw25) debated whether to use `@@` vs `mod` for kind modifiers and how to parenthesise compound expressions such as `(bit32 mod portable) & (float64 mod contended)`
- __RUMINANT:tools__ **merlin LRU indexer semantics** ([ocaml/merlin#2050](https://github.com/ocaml/merlin/issues/2050)): review exchange between [Charlène Gros](https://github.com/Lucccyo) and [@art-w](https://github.com/art-w) on correct `Duplicate` link handling inside the LRU-backed write path, including a discussion of existential type constraints requiring `Obj.magic`
- __RUMINANT:ecosystem__ **MSYS2 depext variable expansion bug** ([ocaml/opam-repository#29749](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29749)): `%{msys2:package-prefix}%` variables were not expanded when passed to pacman, causing spurious reinstallations; resolved by partially reverting [ocaml/opam-repository#29579](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/pull/29579) via [ocaml/opam-repository#29751](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/pull/29751)
- __RUMINANT:ecosystem__ **GCC 15 breaking OCaml 5.0.0 on Arch Linux** ([ocaml/opam-repository#28250](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/28250)) — resurfaced with patches existing in ocurrent/opam-repository but not yet upstreamed; [David Allsopp](https://github.com/dra27) has a plan for upstreaming them
- __RUMINANT:ecosystem__ **jsonschema-validation breakage** from idna.0.4.0 removal of `is_valid_hostname` detected by CI; [Jan Midtgaard](https://github.com/jmid) submitted a same-day constraint fix ([ocaml/opam-repository#29804](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/pull/29804))

weekly_summary.emerging_trends:
- __RUMINANT:oxcaml__ **Mixed block representation overhaul** progressing systematically: uniform blocks for all-value mixed records ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5774](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5774)), `float64`-only records moving to mixed blocks ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5796](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5796)), and `[@@flatten_floats]` as an explicit opt-in ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5795](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5795)) — all from [Ryan Tjoa](https://github.com/rtjoa), moving toward a more uniform memory representation model
- __RUMINANT:oxcaml__ **Compilation speed investment** visible across multiple concurrent efforts: `imported_names` removal ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5886](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5886)), physical equality fixes ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5901](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5901)), `.cmx` export optimization ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5929](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5929)), initial type provision profiling ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5922](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5922)), and CMX loading profiling ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5910](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5910))
